sentences.arabic: كَانَ نُورٌ يُحِبُّ السَّفَرَ إِلَى أَمَاكِنَ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nur je volio putovati na nova mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: Nour loved traveling to new places.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ عَنِ الْمَدِينَةِ فِي كِتَابٍ قَبْلَ السَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Čitao je o gradu u knjizi prije putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: He read about the city in a book before traveling.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ لِنَفْسِهِ قَائِمَةً بِالْأَمَاكِنِ الَّتِي يُرِيدُ زِيَارَتَهَا.
sentences.translation: Napravio je sebi listu mjesta koja želi posjetiti.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote himself a list of places he wanted to visit.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ وَصَلَ بَدَأَ يَزُورُ الْأَمَاكِنَ وَاحِدًا بَعْدَ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Kad je stigao počeo je posjećivati mjesta jedno po jedno.
sentences.translationEn: When he arrived he began visiting the places one by one.
